summary: Re-tested after main agent fix to queue_sms() per-key auto-seed (sms.py:912-935). All 7/7 backend pytests pass WITHOUT manual template upsert. Verified branch_stock_request template was deleted (org had 34 other templates), then on first POST /api/purchase-orders branch_request the backend log shows 'queue_sms auto-seeded missing template key=branch_stock_request for org=...' and the template is re-inserted into sms_templates. SMS queue rows are created with /doc/<code> link in body. Frontend Tab→add-row UX in /branch-transfers Request tab fully works with the documented data-testids (req-product-search-{row.id}, req-qty-{row.id}, req-row-{row.id}). Multi-row Tab works, Tab on non-last qty correctly does NOT add a row. MessagesPage Settings card 'Branch Stock Request — Recipients' renders with all 4 toggles. The CRITICAL bug from iter 245 is FIXED.
critical_code_review_comments: sms.py:912-935 fix is correct — per-key upsert with $setOnInsert ensures idempotency and only seeds the requested missing key. Logs an INFO line for observability. Good.

Minor (carryover from iter 245, not blocking): purchase_orders.py view_link composition still relies on REACT_APP_FRONTEND_URL or APP_PUBLIC_URL env vars; if both missing, the SMS body falls back to a relative '/doc/<code>' which won't be clickable in SMS clients. Confirm production env has APP_PUBLIC_URL set.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — Tab UX + Settings card + toggles all verified

seed_data_creation: Pre-test step: deleted existing sms_templates row where key='branch_stock_request' and org=stock-request-sms so the auto-seed code path could be exercised. Auto-seed correctly re-inserted it on first POST. Tests also create + clean up TEST_BranchRequest PO and its sms_queue rows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 245 critical bug (auto-seed of new DEFAULT_TEMPLATES keys for existing orgs) is FIXED in sms.py:912-935 via per-key $setOnInsert upsert. Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_branch_stock_request_sms_245.py passes 7/7 cleanly. Frontend Tab UX in /branch-transfers Request tab uses data-testids req-product-search-{row.id}, req-qty-{row.id}, req-row-{row.id}, req-add-row — query with prefix selectors like [data-testid^='req-product-search-']. The branch dropdown is the first combobox on the Request tab; need to select a branch first before product rows render. Multi-row Tab cycle: Enter on search picks first match → focuses qty → Tab on last-row qty creates new row and focuses its search. Tab on non-last qty correctly does NOT add a row.

verified_fix.fix: queue_sms() now does per-key $setOnInsert upsert from DEFAULT_TEMPLATES when the requested template key is missing for the org. Logs INFO 'queue_sms auto-seeded missing template key=...' on success.
verified_fix.verification_log: INFO line 'queue_sms auto-seeded missing template key=branch_stock_request for org=stock-request-sms' observed in backend logs after deleting the row and POSTing branch_request PO. No 'template_missing' warning appeared.
verified_fix.regression_status: All 7 pytests (defaults GET, PUT persists, invalid trigger 400, manager 403, SMS queue rows, /doc link in body, public view metadata) pass.
